name: Effects of IL-1 Beta Inhibition on Vascular Inflammation in TET2 Clonal Hematopoiesis
summary: ClinicalTrials.gov phase 2 randomized placebo-controlled registry testing canakinumab effects on vascular inflammation in people with coronary artery disease, including TET2 CHIP stratification and variant-allele-fraction endpoints, recruiting with no posted results in the June 6, 2026 API view.
